authorizer_credentials.description: IAM role ARN specifying the credentials required for the authorizer to invoke a Lambda function.

authorizer_result_ttl_in_seconds.description: Time-to-live duration (in seconds) for caching authorizer results, must be between 0 and 3600.

authorizer_uri.description: URI of the Lambda function to use for the custom authorizer; must be a valid ARN.

identity_source.description: Specifies the source of the identity for authorization, typically a header or query parameter, required for validating requests.

identity_validation_expression.description: Validation regex pattern for incoming identity sources, used to ensure the format of the identity value matches expected requirements.

name.description: Specifies the name of the API Gateway authorizer, which must be unique within the API Gateway instance.

provider_arns.description: List of ARNs for the identity providers that the authorizer uses to validate the caller's identity.

rest_api_id.description: ID of the associated API Gateway REST API that the authorizer will be linked to.

type.description: Specifies the type of authorizer, either TOKEN, REQUEST, or COGNITO_USER_POOLS, to define how authorization is handled.
